title: 统计每家店铺拥有的优惠券数量，并按数量从高到低排列，显示前5名店铺名称和优惠券数量
description: 统计每家店铺拥有的优惠券数量，并按数量从高到低排列，显示前5名店铺名称和优惠券数量

steps.description: 统计每家店铺的优惠券数量，并按数量降序排列，取前5名
steps.sql: SELECT shop_id, COUNT(*) AS voucher_count FROM tb_voucher GROUP BY shop_id ORDER BY voucher_count DESC LIMIT 5

steps.description: 获取前5名店铺的名称和优惠券数量，通过关联tb_shop表
steps.sql: SELECT s.name, v.voucher_count FROM tb_shop s JOIN (SELECT shop_id, COUNT(*) AS voucher_count FROM tb_voucher GROUP BY shop_id ORDER BY voucher_count DESC LIMIT 5) v ON s.id = v.shop_id
